title: Shin Gekijouban Production Timeline
wikitext:
[]: Shin Gekijouban Production Timeline             Quote Post by Szmitten » Thu May 27, 2021 4:08 pm You may or may not be familiar with my TV/movie production timeline I've been working on for the last year: thread/20114/TV-Production-Timeline/ I'm posting here instead of there to protect the unspoiled. I'm neither equipped nor prepared to do so right now, but between CRC's, TV documentaries, tweets, and other sources, the production history of the new movies seems to be far more candid than the original. I had a brief look at a few things in the past year, and have recently been noticing dates on production art (and the documentary) but it would be nice to collate and potentially futureproof sources and information if I wanted to be able to chart the production timeline of these movies a little later. This thread is a literal indulgence though.

[]: Re: Shin Gekijouban Production Timeline             Quote Post by Registration » Thu May 27, 2021 7:59 pm are you following khara2 and ikuto yamashita twitter?

Article: Shin Gekijouban Production Timeline
[]: Shin Gekijouban Production Timeline             Quote Post by Szmitten » Thu May 27, 2021 4:08 pm You may or may not be familiar with my TV/movie production timeline I've been working on for the last year: thread/20114/TV-Production-Timeline/ I'm posting here instead of there to protect the unspoiled. I'm neither equipped nor prepared to do so right now, but between CRC's, TV documentaries, tweets, and other sources, the production history of the new movies seems to be far more candid than the original. I had a brief look at a few things in the past year, and have recently been noticing dates on production art (and the documentary) but it would be nice to collate and potentially futureproof sources and information if I wanted to be able to chart the production timeline of these movies a little later. This thread is a literal indulgence though.
